notes: Maps collection_queue_task ids to research_query_registry.json entries after successful jobs.
Paths are relative to repo root. Promotion is skipped if the artifact is missing.

sec_company_tickers.name: SEC public ticker-to-CIK mapping
sec_company_tickers.description: SEC EDGAR public company_tickers.json mapping (ticker, CIK, title).
sec_company_tickers.recommended_use: Map US equity tickers to CIK before EDGAR submissions fetch.

sec_sp500_submissions.name: SEC EDGAR submissions cache (S&P 500)
sec_sp500_submissions.description: Per-ticker SEC EDGAR submissions JSON cache for S&P 500 universe.
sec_sp500_submissions.recommended_use: Event study and filing history for US large-cap names.

twse_openapi_taiwan_market_layer.name: Taiwan TWSE OpenAPI market layer
twse_openapi_taiwan_market_layer.description: TWSE OpenAPI snapshot: listings, sectors, and disclosure-adjacent market layer.
twse_openapi_taiwan_market_layer.recommended_use: Taiwan equity research and TWSE-linked event studies.

mops_governance_panel.name: Taiwan MOPS governance misconduct panel
mops_governance_panel.description: Official TWSE OpenAPI governance feeds: penalty cases, material information, ESG board structure — MOPS-adjacent misconduct panel.
mops_governance_panel.recommended_use: Corporate governance, misconduct, and trust-premium research on Taiwan listed firms.

yfinance_global_drilldown_10y.name: yfinance global drilldown 10y panel
yfinance_global_drilldown_10y.description: Daily OHLCV panel for global drilldown ticker universe (10y).
yfinance_global_drilldown_10y.recommended_use: Cross-market price panels without paid market data.

skynet_stablecoin_harvest.name: CertiK Skynet stablecoin leaderboard harvest
skynet_stablecoin_harvest.description: Playwright-harvested CertiK Skynet stablecoin API payloads (leaderboard + per-project JSON).
skynet_stablecoin_harvest.recommended_use: Stablecoin security scores and Skynet project metadata without live portal scraping.

ethereum_usdt_rpc_pilot.name: Ethereum USDT ERC-20 transfer RPC pilot sample
ethereum_usdt_rpc_pilot.description: Local RPC pilot extracts for USDT on Ethereum (Etherscan-style research without API key).
ethereum_usdt_rpc_pilot.recommended_use: Preview on-chain USDT flow panels before BigQuery historical runs.
